## General Guide
- [Game Mechanics](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417994340177022981) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1477730088299663431) by Cheri

## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora

## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University

Speaking of which how does this realm thing work
doesnt matter how many of said realm is in a team
if its a mixed realm, it only has half effectiveness for both of the realms

Amount doesn't matter
The realm is considered pure if your team consists only of characters of that realm/Chaos realm
Teams with mixed realms get slight penalties to their realm mechanics
which is considered pure evne when mixed with other realms
Outside of that, your main consideration while building your team should be the characters' kits, rather than their realm
I prefer a mix of damage and sustain
